docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $405.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ECKSTEIN, GINA TABLIZO
